Patch Set 4:

(1 comment)

> Patch Set 4:
> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> Following the discussion with Patrick, I've pushed a new version to hopefully fix the compilation issues. Though I'm not sure iocb_ki_flags_get needs the file argument since we can retrieve it from kiocb. But I don't know if it is always properly defined.

I share this concern - I don't know for sure the kiocb flags are always set on the oldest kernel versions we support.  I'd rather just have the extra code for safety.

Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

The macros in particular are good, I'm not sure I'd have done them so nicely.  Thanks!

Patch Set 4:

(1 comment)

Hi Patrick,

Guillaume is in PTO, so I am taking over.
Can you look into the sanity-sec test_52 failing case?

I have not look into the client encryption implementation, but if I am remembering well we encrypt on page basis. If a page is truncated inside, we have to use the whole page to encrypt the zeros as well.
So when we access to raw encrypted data (O_CIPHERTEXT), we can not truncated the last page by putting 0 in the encrypted page, otherwise we will corrupt the last page.

Patch Set 5:

Zero-ing pages isn't *changed* by this.  I suspect I know what's up though - it's implied in my commit comments...  "copying most of the flags in to the iocb".  It's not *all* of the flags.

So probably the flags indicating O_CIPHERTEXT aren't copied.  I'll need to look in to this a little...

parents.subject: LU-17322 auster: move functions to test-framework.sh

commit.subject: LU-16695 llite: switch to ki_flags from f_flags
commit.message:
LU-16695 llite: switch to ki_flags from f_flags

There are possible races between IO checking f_flags and
fcntl changing f_flags.  The kernel fixed most of these by
copying most of the file flags in to the iocb.

Let's follow on and use those copied flags.  This also lets
us change them if we want, since they're now local to the
specific IO.

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Signed-off-by: Guillaume Courrier <guillaume.courrier@cea.fr>
Change-Id: Ib98cccec0e7888865ec10dc5f76f1d9917a1aef7
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/50493
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Etienne AUJAMES <eaujames@ddn.com>
